details.reasoning: The implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) Stats(StatsArgs) variant with human bool flag added to CacheCommand enum; (2) cache_stats.rs implementation iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage to compute sizes; (3) pub(crate) fn cache_stats returns ExitStatus::Success; (4) --human flag implemented with human_readable_bytes; (5) output includes per-bucket lines and total; (6) mod cache_stats and use statement added to mod.rs; (7) CacheCommand::Stats matched in lib.rs calling commands::cache_stats; (8) code follows cache_size patterns consistently. Additionally, CacheBucket::name() method was appropriately added for human-readable bucket names, test helpers were added, comprehensive test coverage included, edge cases (empty cache, missing paths) are handled, and the preview feature check follows existing patterns.
